description: 개인 Todo List 앱. React 18 + TS + Vite + SCSS. 토스 앱 느낌으로 디자인. 깔끔하고 미니멀한 분위기.

axes.color.primary: #0064FF vs canonical #3182f6 — intentional. See omd:unresolved in DESIGN.md.
axes.font.family: Pretendard (not Toss Product Sans — project already uses Pretendard)

voiceHints: Korean UI labels, English code identifiers
Short imperative verbs for buttons (추가, 저장, 삭제)
Calm, direct, practical — productivity tool not marketing
warnings: color.primary-intent: Using #0064FF (Toss brand/logo blue, Pantone 2175C) as UI interactive color instead of TDS canonical #3182f6 (blue500). This is intentional — richer saturation preferred on web canvas. To realign: set $main-color: #3182f6 in _variables.scss.
